metaDescription: Qwen3-VL (Alibaba (Qwen)), released 2025-09-23 — part of the Qwen-VL line. Vision-language family with Instruct and Thinking variants, starting with 235B-A22B;…
overview: Qwen3-VL is a large language model from Alibaba (Qwen), part of the Qwen-VL line. Released 2025-09-23. Vision-language models that read images, documents, charts and video and (from Qwen3-VL) act as visual agents.

What's notable in this version: Vision-language family with Instruct and Thinking variants, starting with 235B-A22B; later sizes (30B-A3B, 32B, 8B, 4B, 2B) rolled out through October 2025; Apache 2.0 for open variants.
